description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a light wood finish and a darker wood inlay at the center of the tabletop. The desk stands on four angled metal legs, providing stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The tabletop features a central rectangular section that may serve as a writing pad or decorative accent. There is a small circular cutout near the back edge, likely intended for cable management. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible drawers or storage compartments. The desk's proportions and materials suggest it is suitable for both indoor and semi-outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern rectangular desk with a light wood finish, dark wood inlay, and angled metal legs. Features a central accent and a cable management cutout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the desk, the central dark wood inlay, and the cable management cutout at the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the tabletop and the angled metal legs, with the dark inlay visible on the surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edge of the desk, the cable cutout, and the overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same slim profile and leg design as the other side, with the inlay visible.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the cable management cutout and central inlay, intended to be approached from the front where legroom is provided.
